overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic desert city. The character traverses a rooftop overlooking a monorail system, descends to a palm-lined plaza, walks through a covered urban walkway, and crosses a street toward a graffiti-covered building under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway with city overlook

events.description: character descends concrete stairs from rooftop to lower plaza level
pedestrian passes close by the camera view

agents.ego_description: walking along a rooftop walkway overlooking the city, then descending a flight of stairs to ground level

notable_agents.action: seated person stands up and walks past the camera

entered.detail: large curved metal elevated track structure dominating the skyline
multi-story building with orange roof and gray facade
tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements
flat-topped mountain formation visible in the background haze
industrial HVAC equipment on the rooftop surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit rooftop walkway with a sweeping view of a futuristic city. The camera moves forward along the concrete platform, passing industrial ventilation equipment and digital advertising kiosks. A seated person stands up and walks past the camera as the character approaches and descends a flight of stairs, with the massive monorail arch structure visible against the blue sky throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with palm trees and digital signage

events.description: exits rooftop descent into open sunlit plaza at ground level
camera turns right while walking through the plaza toward covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a sunlit plaza with palm trees, passing digital billboards and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench in the shade
pedestrian in white shirt and face mask walking toward camera

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with large satellite dishes on the roof
tall illuminated advertising screen showing product promotions
low concrete seating structures along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairs into a bright open plaza lined with palm trees and concrete benches. The camera turns right while walking, revealing a massive corporate tower with satellite dishes on the right. Several pedestrians walk through the plaza, and digital billboards stand prominently as the character approaches a covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under building overhang with wall advertisements

events.description: enters shadow of building overhang, lighting becomes significantly darker and diffused
approaching exit from covered walkway back to open street area

agents.ego_description: walking under a building overhang along a shaded walkway with wall advertisements on the left

entered.detail: concrete building structure overhead providing shade and cover
large printed posters and murals on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded walkway beneath a building overhang, dramatically changing the lighting from bright sun to cool shadow. The left wall features large advertising posters and murals. The monorail structure and corporate tower fade from view as the character walks along the concrete path toward the street exit, with occasional pedestrians passing in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with graffiti-covered building

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto the asphalt street
character crosses the road toward the building with colorful murals

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching a building covered in colorful graffiti murals

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: low building covered in vibrant purple and pink face murals and graffiti art
large yellow construction cranes visible in the industrial district
asphalt road with parked vehicles along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character exits the shaded walkway into bright sunlight and crosses the asphalt street toward a distinctive building covered in colorful graffiti murals. Several pedestrians cross together in the same direction. Parked cars line the street, and yellow industrial cranes are visible in the distant background as the character approaches the vibrant mural-covered structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a high-altitude rooftop vista down into a vibrant, street-level urban district. It begins on a sunlit concrete walkway overlooking a futuristic city, moving past industrial vents and digital kiosks before descending a flight of stairs beneath a massive monorail arch. As the camera emerges into a bright open plaza, the view expands to reveal palm trees and a towering corporate building equipped with satellite dishes. The scene then shifts dramatically from brilliant sunlight to cool shadow as the character enters a covered walkway lined with advertising posters and murals. Finally, the camera exits the shade and crosses an asphalt street, moving past parked cars and distant industrial cranes toward a building covered in colorful graffiti.
